<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Adults Olanzapine is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia. Olanzapine is effective in maintaining the clinical improvement during continuation therapy in patients who have shown an initial...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.9%）</li>

<li>agoraphobia（99.5%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（99.4%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（99.4%）</li>
<li>endogenous depression（99.3%）</li>
<li>dysthymic disorder（99.3%）</li>
<li>major depressive disorder（99.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
